meaning: n.(接力赛中)末棒运动员,(汇编各地采访人员的资料并进行综合评价的)新闻节目主持人
examples: The anchorman flung his whole weight back, tightening the rope.
The anchorman of the BBC network's evening news got fired.
And the following August, the CBS anchorman anchored Nixon's resignation.
They've also had the opportunity to interview a professional - BBC Spotlight's anchorman Justin Leigh.
It also killed Rahim al-Maliki, an anchorman with Iraqiya state television, the official said.
